examples: Perhaps this was partly because he was a nonsmoker and a teetotaler.
She always refuses wine and only drinks water - I think she's a teetotaler.
My Dad was a teetotaler who didn't permit alcohol in the home, not even for cooking.
Whether you imbibe or are a teetotaler, taxes on beer are more bloated than the federal budget.
Back then, populism was an odd mix of progressivism and Christianity and leftwing grassroots deeply wound to both organized labor and the teetotaler movement.
